comment: 22 application presets: 15 from K-RP loadcalc.k-rp.com + 7 Pakistan-specific. Box temp °C, RH %, TD K. defaultProductId optionally seeds a starter product so Add Product is one-click. Source: walkthrough-v7/presets.json (K-RP captures), Izhar engineering (PK additions).

applications.name: General Walk-in Cooler
applications.description: Multipurpose cooler — product enters at or near room temperature.

applications.name: General Walk-in Freezer
applications.description: Standard freezer storage.

applications.name: Convenience Store Cooler
applications.description: Glass-door reach-in / walk-in for retail.

applications.name: Produce Cooler
applications.description: Mixed fresh produce — high RH preserves moisture.

applications.name: Beer Cooler
applications.description: Bottled / canned beverage display + storage.

applications.name: Prep Room
applications.description: Worker comfort + ingredient holding.

applications.name: Floral Cooler
applications.description: Cut flower storage — gentle dehumidification.

applications.name: Ice Cream Freezer
applications.description: Hardening / display below ice-cream freezing point.

applications.name: Wine Room or Cellar
applications.description: Wine storage — drier, warmer than typical cooler.

applications.name: Warehouse Cooler
applications.description: Large-volume cooler storage.

applications.name: Warehouse Freezer
applications.description: Large-volume frozen storage.

applications.name: Produce Warehouse
applications.description: Bulk produce, longer storage cycles.

applications.name: Beer Warehouse
applications.description: Bulk beverage warehouse.

applications.name: Refrigerated Dock (std)
applications.description: Loading dock at moderate temp.

applications.name: Refrigerated Dock (cold)
applications.description: Loading dock at cooler setpoint.

applications.name: Mango Cold Store
applications.description: Pakistan mango (Sindhri, Chaunsa). +13°C / 90% RH preserves ripening flavour for export.

applications.name: Citrus Pre-cooler
applications.description: Kinnow / orange pre-cooling immediately after harvest.

applications.name: Onion Storage
applications.description: Long-term onion storage — drier than typical cooler.

applications.name: Potato Storage
applications.description: Seed / table potato storage at +5°C with high RH to prevent dehydration.

applications.name: Pharma Cold Chain
applications.description: Vaccines, biologics. WHO/PIC/S audit-grade. Validated +2 to +8°C.

applications.name: Dairy Bulk Reception
applications.description: Bulk milk reception, raw milk holding before processing.

applications.name: Halal Meat Processing
applications.description: Halal meat chiller — rapid pull-down then storage near freezing.
